violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.

inspections.comments: Suggest using a mixture of quat sanitizer from 3 compartment sink dispenser for wiping food prep area surfaces.

violations.description: DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided for the towel bucket sanitizer.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room door noted not self closing.
